HighAvailabilityVirtualIpUnbindingInstan.haVipId: The ID of the high availability virtual IP
HighAvailabilityVirtualIpUnbindingInstan.clientToken: Idempotency token, an ASCII string of no more than 64 characters, see [ClientToken Idempotency Support](VPC/API参考/通用说明.md#幂等性)
HighAvailabilityVirtualIpUnbindingInstan.instanceIds: List of instance IDs to unbind, with a maximum of 5 entries
HighAvailabilityVirtualIpUnbindingInstan.instanceType: Type of instance to unbind; "SERVER" indicates a cloud server (BCC/BBC/DCC), "ENI" indicates an elastic network interface
